report.summary: MASSIVE build cycle: 396 pages generated from 510-keyword opportunity spreadsheet across 18 sections. Page count jumped 192→590 (+398). Vercel deploy triggered (7QPPk9jhNKzLH5dBrxaYNvZZ4uro). No middleware blocking indexing (file absent). Sitemap/robots still missing. 48 agent runs today ($5,167 human-equivalent).

sections.title: Analytics
items: PAGE EXPLOSION: 590 page.tsx files on disk (+398 since standup-v9). Build cycle analyzed 510 keywords and generated 396 template-based pages across 18 sections: learn (87), wallets (34), investing (34), tools (33), exchanges (33), ecosystem (22), defi-lending (22), taxes (17), trading (18), nfts (17), web3-business (14), crypto-cards (14), crypto-loans (12), compare (11), long-term (10), courses (8), spending (7), insurance (5).
Published slugs: 1,832 in published-pages.ts (up from 187 at v9). Gap: 1,242 slugs have no page.tsx yet — these will 404 if accessed.
OG images: 193 SVGs on disk. Coverage gap widening as page count grows — 397 pages lack OG images.

CRITICAL BLOCKER RESOLVED: No middleware.ts file exists. No noindex/x-robots-tag references found anywhere in codebase. The persistent 'middleware blocks 93% of pages' issue from previous cycles appears to be stale — either middleware was removed or never existed in the working tree.
STILL MISSING: No sitemap.ts, no robots.ts, no robots.txt. With 590 pages and no sitemap, Google must discover all pages via internal links only.
Vercel deploy triggered at 16:20 UTC (deployment ID 7QPPk9jhNKzLH5dBrxaYNvZZ4uro) — first deploy in multi-day gap. Status unknown without Vercel API access.
Design cycle fixed 4 broken OG image references, added Breadcrumb/BackToTop/StructuredData to liquid-staking page, fixed unexported metadata on sui-hashi page.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Since standup-v9 (~16:09 UTC): build ran (396 pages from keyword spreadsheet), publish-v3 ran (promoted 4 learn guides + triggered Vercel deploy), design ran (OG fixes + UX components), eod-v10 ran (QA audit found 111 missing page.tsx vs published list).
Today's cumulative: 14 build + 11 design + 10 eod + 3 publish + 10 standup = 48 total agent runs across 2 report locations (Degen0x/reports + cryptodegen/reports).
No .git directory in workspace — cannot verify commit status or run git operations. Previous reports mentioned 6 build-fix commits pushed to main, but git state not verifiable from this session.

CARRY-OVER blockers: (1) Create sitemap.ts (CRITICAL for SEO — 590 pages undiscoverable); (2) Create robots.txt (CRITICAL); (3) Close 1,242-slug page gap (published but no page.tsx → 404s); (4) Generate OG images for 397 new pages; (5) Structural QA sweep on template-generated pages; (6) Wire rate limiter into 6 API routes.
RESOLVED this cycle: Middleware noindex blocker appears stale — no middleware.ts or noindex references exist in working tree.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: 1. VERIFY VERCEL DEPLOY STATUS (URGENT): Deploy 7QPPk9jhNKzLH5dBrxaYNvZZ4uro was triggered at 16:20. Need to confirm it succeeded — if build failed (e.g., TS errors, OOM), the 396 new pages and all fixes are dead. Check Vercel dashboard or CLI.

2. CREATE SITEMAP.TS + ROBOTS.TXT (CRITICAL SEO): With 590 pages on disk and no sitemap, Google has no efficient way to discover them. This is now the #1 SEO blocker. A dynamic sitemap pulling from published-pages.ts would instantly expose all 1,832 routes to crawlers.

3. CLOSE THE PAGE GAP (1,242 ROUTES): Published-pages.ts lists 1,832 slugs but only 590 have page.tsx files. These 1,242 routes will 404 in production. Either generate the remaining pages or remove the slugs from published-pages.ts to avoid serving broken routes.

metrics.label: 💰 Actual Cost — Past Hour
metrics.value: $456 (5 agents: build $233 + publish $55 + design $60 + eod $63 + standup $45)

report.email: FAILED — Resend API blocked by browser CORS policy (TypeError: Failed to fetch). Tried from degen0x.com and api.resend.com contexts — both rejected cross-origin POST. Report saved to disk only.
